calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Nick Shelbi. Giulio Accornero for Gary Harris.

Mr. Accornero reported that the 3 European clients filed instructions regarding notice and that he is waiving notice on behalf of Gary Harris. Ms. Stoneman reported that they filed a supplement, that they have no reason to believe that any of the beneficiaries have been incarcerated, that they paid the probate referee, that they are not requesting extraordinary fees and that the request was a clerical error, that they are willing to reduce the fee base and that a reputable heir search firm was used as it seemed to be a waste of assets to conduct an independent search. Mr. Accornero presented original certified documents to the court, stated that there was a holdback of $70,000.00 for payment of taxes, that there may be penalties and interest in excess of $8,000.00 and stated that this should be a preliminary distribution. Ms. Stoneman stated that the accounting gave the preliminary returns, that the $70,000.00 is in excess, that they did not anticipate the decedent having money and that they are confident the penalties will be waived. Mr. Accornero stated that they are not suggesting that the holdback is not sufficient, that the accounting makes a request to waive fees and that it is not fair to have the beneficiaries responsible if there are penalties. Ms. Stoneman stated that Mr. Shelbi has spent over a year trying to find assets and that she would like him to be paid. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jul-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Nick Shelbi and the Attorney Heather Stoneman to appear on July 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the additional bond has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Subsequent to the hearing it was noted that an additional bond was filed. An Order to Appear will not be issued.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
